stemHtml: Choose the correct option regarding environmental threats (TEM model):

options.a: Some environmental threats can be planned for and some will arise spontaneously, but they all have to be managed by flight crews in real time.
options.b: Environmental threats can be controlled (for example removed or, at least, minimised) at source by aviation organisations.
options.c: Environmental threats refer to weather and terrain only.
options.d: Environmental threats are usually latent in nature.
